title: Rose UpPort
description: Bringing back the classic Minecraft Rose into modern versions.
body:
![upport](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff437990ed87d9cf31c4b4822dbd02c5a26dd16d.png)
![rose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68321f16f70376a2e0bc5859f8610f8b760a6cb4.webp)

**🌹 Rose (Classic Flower)**
The Rose is a classic flower that existed in Minecraft until version 1.7.2, when it was replaced by the Poppy. RoseUpPort brings this nostalgic flower back into modern versions of Minecraft.
 

**📖 History**
Added: In Minecraft Classic (2009), later present through Beta and official releases.
Removed: Replaced by the Poppy in Java Edition 1.7.2 (“The Update that Changed the World”).
Reason: Mojang redesigned flowers for variety and realism.

**🌍 Generation** 
Naturally generates on grass blocks in the Overworld.
Found in Plains, Forest, and Taiga biomes.
Spawn rate and placement are similar to the Poppy.

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
